sentences.target: Ich habe einen Auftrag vom Chef bekommen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk fɔm ʃɛf bəˈkɔmən/

translations.de: Ich habe einen Auftrag vom Chef bekommen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk fɔm ʃɛf bəˈkɔmən/
translations.en: I got an assignment from the boss.
translations.fr: J’ai reçu une mission du patron.
translations.it: Ho ricevuto un incarico dal capo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从老板那儿接到了一项任务。
translations.yue: 我收到老闆嘅一個工作安排。
translations.vi: Tôi được sếp giao một việc.
translations.nl: Ik heb een opdracht van de baas gekregen.
translations.hi: मुझे बॉस से एक काम मिला है.
translations.el: Πήρα μια δουλειά από το αφεντικό.
translations.nb: Jeg fikk en oppgave fra sjefen.
translations.sv: Jag fick en uppgift av chefen.
translations.ro: Am primit o sarcină de la șef.
translations.da: Jeg fik en opgave fra chefen.
translations.ja: 上司から仕事を頼まれました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (present, 1st sg) used to form the Perfekt with the past participle.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular, determiner of 'Auftrag' (direct object).
Common noun (masc.); direct object in the accusative.
Fused preposition+article ('von dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating source/agent.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'vom' (dative).
Main verb in past participle; combines with 'habe' to form the present perfect.

sentences.target: Ich rufe im Auftrag meiner Chefin an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ɪm ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃɛfɪn an/

translations.de: Ich rufe im Auftrag meiner Chefin an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ɪm ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃɛfɪn an/
translations.en: I'm calling on behalf of my boss.
translations.es: Llamo en nombre de mi jefa.
translations.fr: J’appelle au nom de ma cheffe.
translations.it: Chiamo per conto della mia responsabile.
translations.zh-Hans: 我代表我的女上司来电。
translations.yue: 我係代表我嘅女上司打嚟。
translations.ru: Я звоню по поручению моей начальницы.
translations.pt: Estou ligando em nome da minha chefe.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi thay cho sếp của tôi.
translations.uk: Я телефоную від імені моєї начальниці.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बॉस की ओर से फोन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Παίρνω τηλέφωνο εκ μέρους της προϊσταμένης μου.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer på vegne av sjefen min.
translations.id: Saya menelepon atas nama atasan saya.
translations.sv: Jag ringer på uppdrag av min chef.
translations.da: Jeg ringer på vegne af min chef.
translations.ja: 上司の代理でお電話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg); with separable particle 'an' forms the verb 'anrufen' (= to call by phone).
Fused preposition+article ('in dem'); heads the PP 'im Auftrag' (idiomatically 'on behalf of').
Common noun; object of 'im' (dative) within the fixed expression 'im Auftrag'.
Possessive determiner; genitive feminine singular agreeing with 'Chefin'.
Common noun (fem.); genitive singular dependent in the PP ('meiner Chefin').
Separable verb particle completing 'rufe' to 'anrufen'.

sentences.target: Der Kunde storniert den Auftrag wegen der Verspätung.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊndə ʃtɔʁˈniːʁt deːn ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk ˈveːɡn̩ deːʁ fɛɐ̯ˈʃpɛːtʊŋ/

translations.de: Der Kunde storniert den Auftrag wegen der Verspätung.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊndə ʃtɔʁˈniːʁt deːn ˈaʊ̯ftʁaːk ˈveːɡn̩ deːʁ fɛɐ̯ˈʃpɛːtʊŋ/
translations.en: The customer cancels the order because of the delay.
translations.es: El cliente cancela el pedido por el retraso.
translations.fr: Le client annule la commande à cause du retard.
translations.it: Il cliente annulla l’ordine a causa del ritardo.
translations.zh-Hans: 客户因延误取消了订单。
translations.yue: 客人因為延遲取消咗個訂單。
translations.pt: O cliente cancela o pedido por causa do atraso.
translations.he: הלקוח מבטל את ההזמנה בגלל העיכוב.
translations.tr: Müşteri gecikme nedeniyle siparişi iptal ediyor.
translations.vi: Khách hàng hủy đơn vì sự chậm trễ.
translations.nl: De klant annuleert de bestelling vanwege de vertraging.
translations.hu: Az ügyfél a késés miatt lemondja a rendelést.
translations.hi: ग्राहक देरी की वजह से ऑर्डर रद्द कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Klient anuluje zamówienie z powodu opóźnienia.
translations.el: Ο πελάτης ακυρώνει την παραγγελία λόγω καθυστέρησης.
translations.nb: Kunden avbestiller på grunn av forsinkelsen.
translations.sv: Kunden avbokar beställningen på grund av förseningen.
translations.ro: Clientul anulează comanda din cauza întârzierii.
translations.da: Kunden annullerer ordren på grund af forsinkelsen.
translations.ja: 遅延のため注文をキャンセルします。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kunde' (subject).
Common noun (masc.); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Auftrag' (direct object).
Common noun; direct object in the accusative.
Preposition meaning 'because of', governing the genitive.
Definite article, genitive feminine singular; determiner of 'Verspätung'.
Common noun (fem.); object of the preposition 'wegen' in the genitive.

sentences.target: Wir schicken den Auftrag heute raus.

translations.de: Wir schicken den Auftrag heute raus.
translations.en: We're sending the order out today.
translations.yue: 我哋今日會寄出個訂單。
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi sẽ gửi đơn hàng đi.
translations.nl: We sturen de bestelling vandaag op.
translations.hi: हम आज ऑर्डर भेज रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami akan mengirim pesanan hari ini.
translations.ja: 今日、注文を発送します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1st pl); with particle 'raus' forms the separable verb 'rausschicken' (= send out).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Auftrag' (direct object).
Common noun; direct object.
Temporal adverb specifying time.
Separable verb particle completing 'schicken' to mean 'send out'.

Ich rufe im Auftrag meiner Chefin an.
Der Kunde storniert den Auftrag wegen der Verspätung.
Wir schicken den Auftrag heute raus.

I'm calling on behalf of my boss.
The customer cancels the order because of the delay.
